projectDescription: A Minecraft/Spigot plugin that protects critical server commands with password authentication and whitelist management.
keyFeatures: Password-protected command execution with BCrypt encryption
Whitelist-based access control for authorized players
Automatic authentication for premium Minecraft accounts
Discord webhook integration for security alerts
publicApiSurface: /sc setcode <password> - Set your secure authentication code
/sc resetcode <player> - Reset a player's security code
/sc resetall - Reset all security codes in the database
/sc add <player> - Add a player to the whitelist
/sc remove <player> - Remove a player from the whitelist
/sc addcommand <command> - Add a command to the blocked list
/sc removecommand <command> - Remove a command from the blocked list
/sc premium <player> - Toggle premium authentication check for a player
